title: Translation status chip
description: Colour-coded chip for the 5 source values + verified + stale states.

variant.$expr: props.isStale ? 'warning' : (props.verified ? 'success' : ({ file: 'neutral', db: 'accent', ai: 'info', human: 'success', imported: 'neutral' }[props.source] || 'neutral'))

leadingIcon.$expr: props.isStale ? 'exclamation-triangle' : (props.verified ? 'check-circle' : ({ file: 'document', db: 'circle-stack', ai: 'sparkles', human: 'user-circle', imported: 'arrow-down-tray' }[props.source]))

children.$expr: props.isStale ? 'Stale' : (props.verified ? 'Verified' : (props.source === 'ai' && props.provider ? (props.provider === 'openai' ? 'OpenAI' : (props.provider === 'google' ? 'Google' : (props.provider === 'deepl' ? 'DeepL' : props.provider))) : ({ file: 'File', db: 'DB', ai: 'AI', human: 'Human', imported: 'Imported' }[props.source])))
